steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content:
Divide both sides by negative two.
$$|x-7|=4x$$
Since the left side is nonnegative,
$$x\ge 0$$

steps.title: Use the valid branch
steps.content:
A valid solution must have $x\ge 0$. If $x\ge 7$, then $|x-7|=x-7$, which gives $x=-\frac{7}{3}$ and contradicts $x\ge 7$. Thus use $|x-7|=7-x$.
$$7-x=4x\Rightarrow 7=5x\Rightarrow x=\frac{7}{5}$$
The answer is B.
